# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Vitriol — Core runtime dependencies snapshot
#
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.
# pyproject.toml is the single source of truth for dependency versions.
# This file is kept only as a convenience snapshot for tools that still expect
# a requirements.txt (e.g. Docker base images, pip-tools, third-party scanners).
#
# To install for development, prefer:
#     pip install -e ".[dev,viz,webui,api]"
#
# To regenerate this file after editing pyproject.toml:
#     python -c "import tomllib, pathlib; \
#         deps = tomllib.loads(pathlib.Path('pyproject.toml').read_text())['project']['dependencies']; \
#         pathlib.Path('requirements.txt').write_text('\n'.join(sorted(deps)) + '\n')"
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
